articles.summary: Name: Nike Shox TLColorway: TBCSKU: IR2097-001MSRP: TBCRelease Date: TBCNike is pushing the Shox TL further into fashion territory with an all-black leather rework that trades the silhouette's original mesh and synthetic construction for a more polished material palette. The upcoming Nike Shox TL retains the model's aggressive Shox column tooling and futuristic profile, but rebuilds the upper around leather panels that reposition the runner closer to a dress-adjacent register than a track-adjacent one.Construction on the pair centers on a full material overhaul of the upper. Nike has stripped out the Shox TL's signature mesh construction and synthetic overlays and replaced them with black leather panels that cover the toebox, midfoot, and heel. While much of Fashion Week was a rather stylish sprint between shows, the brand’s showroom pitstop kept it calm with an immersive tale of two silhouettes.A playful, sleek nod to classic bon vivant culture, guests could chill, sip, and shop in the Le Marais pop-up, which doubled as a breather before heading back into the city. articles.summary: SummaryOff-White launched L/AB c/o, a new sub-label continuing Virgil Abloh’s accessible "Off-White For All" concept for young consumers.The debut collection features classic industrial-style apparel and sneakers, with all pieces priced under $200.Off-White has a new sub-label, which some fans may find familiar. As a re-up to Virgil Abloh’s accessible “Off-White For All” concept, the late designer’s imprint is reintroducing a diffusion line under a new name with the same message — L/AB c/o.The collection features apparel and sneakers rendered in the brand’s classic industrial aesthetics, including the diagonal strip motif, typographic prints, and plenty of “Off-White” callouts. articles.summary: Name: ASICS GT-2160 BREEZE PackMSRP: ¥15,400 JPY (approx. $95 USD)Release Date: July 2Where to Buy: ASICSASICS has unveiled the GT‑2160 BREEZE Pack, spotlighting a trio of lifestyle‑driven sneakers that reinterpret the retro runner silhouette with modern finishes. Designed for warmer conditions and water-friendly wear, the silhouette arrives in three distinct, versatile colorways: the sleek "Black/Pink Cloud," the crisp and neutral "Glacier Grey/Cream" and the rugged, earth-toned "Brown Storm/Black Coffee."The upper construction retains the sleek aesthetic of the original GT-2000 series but updates it with a soft, slip-on-friendly neoprene tongue and sockliner. articles.title: Salomon Captures Mount Fuji's Summit With the X ULTRA 360 "GORAIKO"
articles.summary: Name: Salomon X ULTRA 360 GORE-TEX GORAIKOColorway: TBCSKU: L45489000MSRP: ¥20,900 JPY (approx. $129 USD)Release Date: July 1Where to Buy: SalomonThe Salomon X ULTRA 360 GORE-TEX GORAIKO stands as a highly conceptual, performance-driven tribute to Japan’s legendary summit, drawing direct design inspiration from "Goraiko" — the awe-inspiring viewing of the sunrise from the peak of Mount Fuji.The upper features a charcoal grey sole unit and an off-white upper, evoking the shifting brightness against the dark volcanic rock ground. Technical mesh panels are reinforced with synthetic overlays, while the waterproof GORE‑TEX membrane ensures durability and weather protection. Rather than running a single material across the full upper, Nike divides the build between glossy patent leather on the toe box and quarter panels and a softer suede or nubuck across the overlays. articles.title: The Nike Moon Shoe OG "Cacao Wow" Is a Faithful Recreation of the Waffle Sole That Started It All
articles.summary: Name: Nike Moon Shoe OG “Cacao Wow”Colorway: Cacao Wow/Gum Light Brown/SailSKU: IX3952-200MSRP: TBCRelease Date: TBCNike is returning to its earliest design artifact with the Moon Shoe OG in "Cacao Wow/Gum Light Brown/Sail." The shoe reconstructs the nylon-and-waffle construction that Bill Bowerman developed before the company had even settled on the name Nike, pairing it with a warm, earth-toned colorway that lets the silhouette's utilitarian bones speak without distraction.The construction brief here is straightforward and deliberately so. A nylon upper forms the base of the shoe, carrying the textured, lightweight quality that defined the original's aesthetic in an era when running footwear was still a nascent design category. articles.title: Rick Owens Beats Paris Heatwave With Air-Conditioned adidas Collaboration for SS27

articles.title: This Nike Air Force 1 Low “What The” Stacks Safari, Elephant Print, and Jewel Eye Branding Into One Black Build
articles.summary: Name: Nike Air Force 1 Low “What The”Colorway: TBCSKU: IV4451-010MSRP: TBCRelease Date: TBCNike's Air Force 1 Low “What The” is arriving with a texture-forward build that distributes three distinct materials across a predominantly black upper.
